genre_refs: 'Left Exit 12 Off Ramp' / car drifting at highway-exit reaction meme
description: A meme built on the 'Left Exit 12 Off Ramp' internet meme template: a still of a dark sedan veering sharply off a highway onto an exit ramp beneath an overpass, smoke coming from its tires. The green overhead highway sign is edited so the straight-ahead arrow is labeled 'FUNDING GENDER EQUITY IN THE MEXICAN WORKFORCE' and the exit arrow is labeled 'INVESTING IN AMERICAN WORKERS'; the small 'LEFT EXIT 12' marker is retained at top. The U.S. Department of Labor seal (blue circle, eagle and shield, 'DEPARTMENT OF LABOR / UNITED STATES OF AMERICA') is superimposed in the center over the car.
notable_text: FUNDING GENDER EQUITY IN THE MEXICAN WORKFORCE | INVESTING IN AMERICAN WORKERS | LEFT EXIT 12 | DEPARTMENT OF LABOR UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
